name: smart-fashion-ai
description: Website bán quần áo tích hợp AI — Chatbot, AI Search, Recommendation, Behavior Analysis
author: Smart Fashion AI Team

scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/.env down -v && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/.env up -d
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
